title: Tunisian Coconut Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew made with tender beef and a blend of African spices, served with a side of warm pita bread.

ingredients.name: desiccated coconut
ingredients.notes: adds a rich and creamy texture

ingredients.name: tunisian spice blend
ingredients.notes: a mix of cumin, coriander, and turmeric

ingredients.name: savory stir-fry sauce
ingredients.notes: adds a tangy and slightly sweet flavor

ingredients.name: velvety coconut milk
ingredients.notes: adds a rich and creamy texture

instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add beef and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add onion and garlic and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Stir in Tunisian spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
Add savory stir-fry sauce and coconut milk, and stir to combine.
Bring stew to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 1/2 hours, or until beef is tender.
Stir in desiccated coconut and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley.
